# Compounding Memory Proof

## Goal

Make the system sharper every week.

## Memory files

```text
memory/buyer_language.md
memory/experiment_memory.md
memory/tactic_performance.md
memory/proof_assets.md
memory/failure_patterns.md
memory/winning_angles.md
```

## Update rule

Each campaign must propose memory updates.

## Reuse rule

Before creating variants, agent must read related prior memory.
